message.content:
{
  "page_type": "text_scan",
  "summary": "This page from an HVAC manual provides installation and electrical system instructions for a modular air-cooled system. It includes text sections on expansion tank placement, main power distribution, grounding, voltage checks, and wiring requirements, along with a wiring diagram showing connections between a hand controller, main unit, and auxiliary units.",
  "visual_entities": [
    {"type": "text_section", "label": "Expansion tank installation instructions"},
    {"type": "text_section", "label": "Electrical system section"},
    {"type": "text_section", "label": "Main power distribution instructions"},
    {"type": "text_section", "label": "Grounding measures"},
    {"type": "text_section", "label": "Voltage check instructions"},
    {"type": "text_section", "label": "Wiring requirements (red text)"},
    {"type": "diagram", "label": "Wiring diagram for hand controller and units"},
    {"type": "component", "label": "Hand controller (手操器)"},
    {"type": "component", "label": "Main unit (主机)"},
    {"type": "component", "label": "Auxiliary unit 1 (辅机1)"},
    {"type": "component", "label": "Auxiliary unit N (辅机N)"},
    {"type": "terminal", "label": "GND"},
    {"type": "terminal", "label": "12V"},
    {"type": "terminal", "label": "A"},
    {"type": "terminal", "label": "B"}
  ],
  "visual_relationships": [
    {"from": "Hand controller", "relation": "connects to", "to": "Main unit"},
    {"from": "Main unit", "relation": "connects to", "to": "Auxiliary unit 1"},
    {"from": "Auxiliary unit 1", "relation": "connects to", "to": "Auxiliary unit N"},
    {"from": "Hand controller", "relation": "has terminal", "to": "GND"},
    {"from": "Hand controller", "relation": "has terminal", "to": "12V"},
    {"from": "Hand controller", "relation": "has terminal", "to": "A"},
    {"from": "Hand controller", "relation": "has terminal", "to": "B"},
    {"from": "Main unit", "relation": "has terminal", "to": "GND"},
    {"from": "Main unit", "relation": "has terminal", "to": "A"},
    {"from": "Main unit", "relation": "has terminal", "to": "B"},
    {"from": "Auxiliary unit 1", "relation": "has terminal", "to": "GND"},
    {"from": "Auxiliary unit 1", "relation": "has terminal", "to": "A"},
    {"from": "Auxiliary unit 1", "relation": "has terminal", "to": "B"},
    {"from": "Auxiliary unit N", "relation": "has terminal", "to": "GND"},
    {"from": "Auxiliary unit N", "relation": "has terminal", "to": "A"},
    {"from": "Auxiliary unit N", "relation": "has terminal", "to": "B"}
  ],
  "useful_for_knowledge_types": ["installation_procedures", "electrical_wiring", "system_configuration", "safety_requirements"],
  "ocr_text_if_useful": "青岛海尔空调电子有限公司 风冷模块调试手册 第1次修订时间: 03.10.20 共15页 第8页\n(7)膨胀水箱应安装在高于系统最高处1~1.5米处;水箱容量约为整个系统容量的1/10;排气阀应安装在系统最高处与膨胀水箱之间;冷冻水管路和膨胀水箱应作保温处理。\n三.电系统\n1.主电源配电\n每个模块都要从配电柜相应的空气开关引进主电源(参考电缆线5×16mm²),各模块相序一致。不得从主机或任意模块并联出电源。\n2.接地措施\n检查机组是否可靠接地。\n3.检查主电源三相电压是否平衡,且电压为380V±5%。\n先用万用表交流档对三相电进行测试,记录相间电压,相零电压;标记出零线,地线.防止接线时相零错接。\n4.电源必须位三相五线制,禁止零地合一,零地合一易烧毁电脑板.如安装过程出现零地合一,先调整电源,调整到位后,再进行接线。\n二. 机组手操器、信号线连接\n手操器 主机 辅机1 辅机N\nGND 12V A B GND A B GND A B\n8\n制冷百家网: www.zhilengbj.cn",
  "uncertainty_notes": "The diagram shows connections but does not specify the exact wiring protocol (e.g., RS-485). The text mentions 'signal line connection' but details are visual only. The red text emphasizes critical warnings, but the exact consequences of 'zero-ground merger' are described textually, not visually.",
  "confidence": 0.9
}

parsed.summary: This page from an HVAC manual provides installation and electrical system instructions for a modular air-cooled system. It includes text sections on expansion tank placement, main power distribution, grounding, voltage checks, and wiring requirements, along with a wiring diagram showing connections between a hand controller, main unit, and auxiliary units.

visual_entities.label: Wiring diagram for hand controller and units

parsed.ocr_text_if_useful:
青岛海尔空调电子有限公司 风冷模块调试手册 第1次修订时间: 03.10.20 共15页 第8页
(7)膨胀水箱应安装在高于系统最高处1~1.5米处;水箱容量约为整个系统容量的1/10;排气阀应安装在系统最高处与膨胀水箱之间;冷冻水管路和膨胀水箱应作保温处理。
三.电系统
1.主电源配电
每个模块都要从配电柜相应的空气开关引进主电源(参考电缆线5×16mm²),各模块相序一致。不得从主机或任意模块并联出电源。
2.接地措施
检查机组是否可靠接地。
3.检查主电源三相电压是否平衡,且电压为380V±5%。
先用万用表交流档对三相电进行测试,记录相间电压,相零电压;标记出零线,地线.防止接线时相零错接。
4.电源必须位三相五线制,禁止零地合一,零地合一易烧毁电脑板.如安装过程出现零地合一,先调整电源,调整到位后,再进行接线。
二. 机组手操器、信号线连接
手操器 主机 辅机1 辅机N
GND 12V A B GND A B GND A B
8
制冷百家网: www.zhilengbj.cn
parsed.uncertainty_notes: The diagram shows connections but does not specify the exact wiring protocol (e.g., RS-485). The text mentions 'signal line connection' but details are visual only. The red text emphasizes critical warnings, but the exact consequences of 'zero-ground merger' are described textually, not visually.
